creator: peter.kien@posteo.org
text:
If you try to launch it, python will either complain about a missing avbin-library
OR (in case you *do* have multimedia/avbin installed) there's an error message about some "undefined img_convert symbol".

But none of this is important, because this port is badly outdated.

Version 4.4 is from 2009.

The current version is 4.8.4 (from 2015).
